\begin{table}

\caption{Aggregate model comparison on 204 clean human team-rounds. Combo-$r$ / marg-$r$: Pearson correlation between predicted and empirical distributions over joint role combinations / role marginals. Aggregate-LL: per-stage aggregate cross-entropy of the empirical stage distribution under the model; mean-LL: mean per-environment log-likelihood. Higher is better for all four; best per column in bold.}
